name: Arlecchino - The Line She Crossed
description:
It wasn't the first anniversary that didn't go as you planned. But you surely didn't expect to wake up in the hospital with bandages wrapped around your head.

Note: Honestly, I didn't expect this bot to become the fastest of my bots to collect chats but that's just how it is. Thank you all.

Have you ever felt that you just can't get enough angst out of bot? As if there's some line they don't cross, you just can't make them hurt you for real.

I did. That's why this bot exists.

Maybe, that would be easier to do with proxy. But since I'm having problems with it now, I decided to do the angst myself - the way I like it. The cruel, cold, bloody way.

Had to change the bot a bit for that. She's still running "House of The Heart" but without the children trio now - they simply weren't fitting in the concept. Also, now she's more cold and less approachable comparing to previous "domestic" version.

There's a fine line between love and hate, they say. Guess we'll see about that.

As always, everything is up to you. Though, If you want some idea, you could go with the "amnesia" route.

Also, check my other Genshin Impact bots.

1. La Signora - Seeking Warmth

2. Rosmarine - Thorny Benevolence - Male Rosaria AU

3. Scaramouche - No Strings Attached

4. La Signora - Maddening Recollection

5. Shenhe - The Heart You Gave Her (WALL-E AU)

The timeline of The Crimson Cross series:

THE MAIN SERIES:

(the titles are clickable)

1. Unreleased Prequel - Set some time after the marriage

2. The Line She Crossed - Set some time into the marriage - YOU'RE HERE

3. <
